headline: Waymo Widens Lead Over Tesla, Expands Robotaxis To Four New Cities
summary: Alphabet-backed Waymo remains far ahead of robotaxi rival Tesla and Amazon-owned Zoox, adding Las Vegas and three other cities.

headline: Will Gross Booking Strength Give a Boost to Uber's Results in Q2?

headline: Nancy Pelosi bets up to $6 million on Intel and Uber, public disclosures show

headline: Is It Worth Investing in Uber (UBER) Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Uber (UBER) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

headline: Mark Kelly Says 'AI Is Becoming Part of Their Daily Lives' as New 'Aging With AI Act' Studies Chatbots' Impact on Seniors
summary: Kelly’s Aging With AI Act aims to study how chatbots affect seniors, exploring AI benefits, risks, scams and fraud threats facing older adults.
